subcodes.first_line: Thou hast written that some of the friends have informed thee that if man does not progress, he will perish and become nonexistent.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مرقوم نموده بودی که از احبّا شنيدی که انسان اگر ترقّی ننمايد محو و نابود گردد مقصد عدم صرف نيست
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @differences in human capacity, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
